name: Everlasting Snooze
short_description: You lost your memory of nothing but a mundane day. But why do mysterious men keep jamming into your life, all of them pointing to the day you forgot? Find out a hypnotherapy clinic receptionist's memory of an insignificant day in this BL visual novel.
detailed_description:
Explore a hypnotherapy clinic receptionist's memory of an insignificant (yester)day in this BL visual novel.

story

Hypnotherapy clinic receptionist Cereus Bai lives a boring life until he finds out that he has lost his memory of yesterday. His boss and doctor Vere Strauss confirms that lost yesterday was just a boring day like his previous life.

But mysterious men keep appearing in his life one after another. The self-proclaimed roommate Kurokawa Ryo, the frivolous and charming hypnotist Magenta, and the looming mysterious boy... They all seem to be related to Cereus's "yesterday".

What happened yesterday? Does all this really matter? Is Cereus ready to face his yesterday, or even all his past?

routes

  • The owner of the clinic you spend every day with.

  • A performing hypnotist on tour.

  • An unsolicited roommate.

  • A phantom seen at the hypnotist show. (Non-romantic route)

feature

  • 3 romanceable characters, 4 routes, leading to 10 endurable endings.

  • Around 6.0 hours of gameplay to full achievement.

  • Much drama, little romance.

  • Toggleable built-in guides with visual representation of value changes and checks

trilogy

"The Mind Deceivers" Trilogy is a series of pyschology science fantasy BL cinematic novels. Titles in this trilogy shares the same world view but can be played independently. Each title has its own characters and story, with only 1-2 recurring characters as cameos.

This is part II of "The Mind Deceivers" Trilogy.
